intended_use: Bunkerhill MAC is a software device intended for use in detecting presence and estimating quantity of mitral annulus calcification for adult patients aged 40 years and above. The device automatically
intended_use_full: Bunkerhill MAC is a software device intended for use in detecting presence and estimating quantity of mitral annulus calcification for adult patients aged 40 years and above. The device automatically analyzes non-gated, non-contrast chest computed tomography (CT) images collected during clinical care and outputs the region of interest (intended for informational purposes only) and quantification of detected calcium.
ground_truth: Established reference standard for detection, localization and agreement of device output (non-gated CT reference measurements)
other_metrics: Positive Agreement Rate, Negative Agreement Rate, Precision: 0.885 (0.848, 0.919), Recall: 0.867 (0.834, 0.895), Bland Altman mean difference: -6.47 AU, limits of agreement: -399.57 AU to 386.64 AU, correlation coefficient
